prerequisites: A Coassemble account with API access enabled.
API credentials generated from Coassemble: a User ID and a User Token. Generate these by following the Coassemble API getting-started guide.
Provide both required config fields: user_id and user_token.

authMethods.name: User ID and User Token
authMethods.summary: Coassemble authenticates API requests with a paired credential: a User ID (user_id) and a User Token (user_token). Both are required and map to the connector's user_id and user_token secret fields. Generate them from your Coassemble account by following the Coassemble API documentation.

setupSteps.title: Create or sign in to a Coassemble account
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Coassemble (or create an account) and confirm you have API access. Review the Coassemble API getting-started guide at developers.coassemble.com to set up API access.

setupSteps.title: Generate your API credentials
setupSteps.body: Following the Coassemble API documentation, generate your API credentials: a User ID and a User Token. These two values are what the connector uses to authenticate.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter your User ID in the user_id field and your User Token in the user_token field. Both fields are required and are stored as secrets.
